## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint test` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] Public API changes add an entry under `[Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Exported symbols have godoc, with an `Example*` where useful
- [ ] Commits signed with `git commit -s` and follow Conventional Commits
